leadText: The Coastal Biome (Japanese: コーストエリア Coastal Area) is a large biome within the Terarium, located in the Unova region's Blueberry Academy.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The Coastal Biome has a variety of habitats , from white beaches to open seas, to a big rocky mountain in the center with tropical coastal islands surrounding it. The player can find plenty of Water-type Pokémon in the sea and Grass-type Pokémon on the tropical islands. Plenty of Alolan forms of Pokémon can be found here too.

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Coastal Plaza 1.2 Coastal Outdoor Classroom 1.3 Coastal Rest Area 1.4 Torchlit Labyrinth Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Coastal Plaza [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Coastal Plaza The Coastal Plaza is located in the northern portion of the biome. The player can challenge Lacey of the BB League here. Coastal Outdoor Classroom [ edit | edit source ] Located near the center of the biome, the outdoor classroom becomes a stop for Flying Taxis once visited. Coastal Rest Area [ edit | edit source ] A rest area is located along the eastern side of the biome. A guidance counselor is found here, who will reward the player for defeating Trainers in the Coastal Biome. The player can heal their Pokémon here and purchase items from vending machines .
